description: Built an AI career assistant that tailors resumes and generates job-specific cover letters. project_name: SaaS Customer Churn Prediction and Retention
description: Developed an end-to-end SaaS customer churn platform using synthetic event-level data to mimic real customer behavior. Implemented a LightGBM model to predict churn probability, SHAP to explain risk factors and survival analysis (Cox Proportional Hazards) to estimate time-to-churn to enable prioritization of retention efforts.

Implemented a LightGBM model to predict churn probability, SHAP to explain risk factors and survival analysis (Cox Proportional Hazards) to estimate time-to-churn to enable prioritization of retention efforts.
